description_long: This is a tall, freestanding wooden shelving unit with a natural walnut finish. The upper section features two open shelves, ideal for displaying books, decor, or other items, while the lower section consists of a cabinet with two hinged doors equipped with vertical metal handles. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving the piece a warm and classic appearance suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments. The back and sides are solid, providing structural stability and a clean look from all angles. The cabinet doors likely conceal additional storage space, making this unit both functional and aesthetically pleasing. The overall design is simple yet practical, fitting seamlessly into offices, garages, or public waiting areas.
description: A tall, walnut-finished wooden shelving unit with two open shelves above a two-door cabinet, featuring metal handles and a clean, classic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing two open shelves and a two-door cabinet with metal handles.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the shelves and cabinet, with handles slightly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a solid wood back with no visible openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the unit's depth and profile.
